label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this gift exchange problem. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. The question is about tracking the swaps and figuring out what Alice ends up with. First, let me list out the initial presents: - Alice: white - Bob: green - Claire: yellow - Dave: purple - Eve: pink Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each one step by step. Maybe I should track each person's present after each swap. First swap: Alice and Dave swap. So Alice had white, Dave had purple. After swapping, Alice gets purple, and Dave gets white. So after first swap: - Alice: purple - Dave: white Others remain the same: Bob (green), Claire (yellow), Eve (pink) Second swap: Claire and Dave swap. At this point, Dave has white (from the first swap). Claire has yellow. So swapping those. Now Claire gets white, and Dave gets yellow. After second swap: - Claire: white - Dave: yellow Others: Alice (purple), Bob (green), Eve (pink) Third swap: Dave and Eve swap. Dave has yellow, Eve has pink. After swapping, Dave gets pink, Eve gets yellow. After third swap: - Dave: pink - Eve:
